name: contracts
description: Stellar Soroban Smart Contracts for NFT-DND

scripts.deploy:local:all: npm run deploy:local:dnd-token && echo 'Deploy remaining contracts with IDs from previous deploys'
scripts.bindings:dnd-token: stellar contract bindings typescript --network testnet --network-passphrase "Test SDF Network ; September 2015" --contract-id CB2RIG4PPLQNW4EBL6WRWU4VSHO4GCH722XT4BLXMJ7NJM34ZI2OC2RU --output-dir ../client/src/contracts/dnd-token
scripts.bindings:fate-verifier: stellar contract bindings typescript --network testnet --network-passphrase "Test SDF Network ; September 2015" --contract-id CCIGFXIXSFUCYWRJVCXFOBAC2KRS4C4AQZRFGSM6A7H3KRXV552CGMCW --output-dir ../client/src/contracts/fate-verifier
scripts.bindings:relic-registry: stellar contract bindings typescript --network testnet --network-passphrase "Test SDF Network ; September 2015" --contract-id CAOXCTX57AJJA6D2QN5UXDF3OHDZBDBS2J6SKSHI7TOFTMKGKD5Y5H2X --output-dir ../client/src/contracts/relic-registry
scripts.bindings:adventure-vault: stellar contract bindings typescript --network testnet --network-passphrase "Test SDF Network ; September 2015" --contract-id CCIIZ2MFPGV3SIRM3K2ZJFVPG6LMDCROTYUDTKI2GB6OHWZLRSSTGQ6J --output-dir ../client/src/contracts/adventure-vault
